name: Smithen
passive: Passive — Frost Edge: Smithen's damaging abilities deal +2 damage to targets that currently have any Freeze stacks.

abilities.name: Ice Needle
abilities.desc: Ranged icecraft attack. Deal 2 damage. If this hit deals HP damage, apply 2 Freeze.

abilities.name: Whiteout Step
abilities.desc: Guard. Smithen gains Dodge. Dodge prevents the next attack targeting Smithen this round, then Dodge is removed.

abilities.name: Frost Pin
abilities.desc: Ranged status. Apply 2 Freeze to one enemy. If that enemy already had any Freeze before this ability, also apply Exposed.

abilities.name: Shatter Shot
abilities.desc: Assassin icecraft payoff. Deal 3 damage with Pierce 2. Can target backline. If the target has Freeze, remove all Freeze and gain +2 damage per removed Freeze.

name: Dravain
passive: Passive — Blood Guard: when Dravain consumes Bleed with Blood Claim, Dravain restores 1 HP. This is healing from consumed blood, not Shield.

abilities.name: Protect Ally
abilities.desc: Guard. Choose another ally. Remove 1 negative status from that ally. The first attack targeting that ally this round targets Dravain instead.

abilities.name: Shield Bash
abilities.desc: Melee warrior attack. Deal damage equal to 2 plus Dravain's current Armor.

abilities.name: Vampiric Thrust
abilities.desc: Melee vampire attack. Deal 3 damage. If this deals HP damage, Dravain restores 2 HP.

abilities.name: Blood Claim
abilities.desc: Bleed payoff. Remove all Bleed from one enemy. Deal removed Bleed +2 damage. If any Bleed was removed, Dravain restores 1 HP.

name: Yaura
passive: Passive — Blood Echo: once per round, when one of your own abilities makes an ally lose HP, apply 1 Bleed to each enemy in the front row.

abilities.name: Blood Ward
abilities.desc: Guard. Choose an ally. That ally loses 1 HP and gains +1 Armor this round. If that ally is attacked this round, the attacker gains 2 Bleed.

abilities.name: Blood Infusion
abilities.desc: Setup. Choose an ally. That ally's next attack this round deals +3 damage. If that attack deals HP damage, apply 3 Bleed.

abilities.name: Blood Price
abilities.desc: Bloodcraft attack. Yaura loses 2 HP, then attacks one enemy for 6 damage.

abilities.name: Red Rain
abilities.desc: Bloodcraft area setup. Apply 1 Bleed to every enemy.

name: K'ku
passive: Passive — Cold Hide: after an enemy hits K'ku with a melee attack, that enemy gains 1 Freeze.

abilities.name: Ice Guard
abilities.desc: Guard. If K'ku is hit this round, the attacker gains 2 Freeze and K'ku gains +1 Armor until end of round.

abilities.name: Frost Slam
abilities.desc: Front-line brute attack. Deal 3 damage. If this hit deals HP damage, apply 1 Freeze.

abilities.name: Glacier Break
abilities.desc: Front-line brute payoff. Deal 5 damage. If the target has Freeze, deal +2 damage.

abilities.name: Blizzard Roar
abilities.desc: Front-row setup. Apply 2 Freeze and Exhausted to enemies in the front row.

name: Kahro
passive: Passive — Opportunist: Kahro's damaging abilities deal +1 damage to targets that currently have any negative status.

abilities.name: Shadow Needle
abilities.desc: Assassin precision. Deal 3 damage with Pierce 2. Can target backline.

abilities.name: Shadow Mark
abilities.desc: Ranged setup. Apply Exposed and Dread to one enemy. Dread disables one random non-Guard ability until end of round.

abilities.name: Assassinate
abilities.desc: Assassin precision. Deal 5 damage with Pierce 2. Can target backline. If the target is in the back row and the front row is empty, deal +3 damage.

abilities.name: Vanish
abilities.desc: Guard. Kahro gains Dodge. Dodge prevents the next attack targeting Kahro this round, then Dodge is removed.

name: Maoja
passive: Passive — Toxic Momentum: Maoja's damaging abilities deal +1 damage to targets that currently have Poison.

abilities.name: Poison Hands
abilities.desc: Ally buff. Choose an ally. Until end of next round, each damaging hit by that ally also applies 2 Poison to its target.

abilities.name: Corrosive Grip
abilities.desc: Front-line brute attack. Deal 3 damage and apply 1 Poison. If the target already had Poison, also apply Exhausted.

abilities.name: Caustic Breath
abilities.desc: Row status. Choose an enemy row. Apply 3 Poison to each enemy in that row.

abilities.name: Rot Burst
abilities.desc: Front-line witchcraft payoff. Remove all Poison. Deal removed Poison x2 damage, ignoring Armor.

name: Paleya
passive: Passive — Mind Weaver: the first time each round Paleya consumes Hypnosis with Mind Lance, gain +1 Action next round.

abilities.name: Mind Lance
abilities.desc: Magic attack. Deal 2 damage. If the target has Hypnosis, remove Hypnosis and deal 8 damage instead.

abilities.name: Mesmerize
abilities.desc: Ranged control. Apply Hypnosis to one enemy. Hypnosis is non-stackable and does nothing until another ability uses it.

abilities.name: Mirror Guard
abilities.desc: Guard prediction. Choose an enemy. If it uses a damaging attack this round, cancel that action and apply Hypnosis and Exposed to it.

abilities.name: Mass Suggestion
abilities.desc: Front-row control. Apply Hypnosis and Exposed to each enemy in the front row. This ability deals no immediate damage.

name: Poom
passive: Passive — Purple Blood: Poom's blood is hypnotic. After an enemy hits Poom with a melee attack that deals HP damage, that enemy gains Hypnosis.

abilities.name: Mesmeric Taunt
abilities.desc: Guard payoff. Consume Hypnosis from all enemies. For each enemy that lost Hypnosis this way, offensive actions they use this turn are redirected to Poom. Poom gains +1 Armor, plus +1 Armor for each Hypnosis consumed.

abilities.name: Bash
abilities.desc: Front-line brute attack. Deal 4 damage.

abilities.name: Mesmer Roar
abilities.desc: Front-line hypnotic payoff. Deal 3 damage. If the target has Hypnosis, remove Hypnosis and deal +6 damage.

abilities.name: Revenge Body
abilities.desc: Front-line brute attack. Poom loses 2 HP, ignoring Armor and Shield. Then deal 5 damage. If Poom already lost HP this round, deal +3 damage.

name: Bahl
passive: Passive — Demon Infection: when Bahl applies Poison with an ability, each enemy in the front row also gains 1 Bleed. When Bahl applies Bleed with an ability, each enemy in the front row also gains 1 Poison.

abilities.name: Infect Mark
abilities.desc: Ranged demon setup. Apply 2 Poison and 1 Bleed to one enemy.

abilities.name: Dark Proliferation
abilities.desc: Ranged payoff. Choose an enemy. Double that enemy's current Poison, Bleed, and Freeze stacks. If it has Hypnosis, also apply Exposed. This ability deals no immediate damage.

abilities.name: Plague Wave
abilities.desc: AoE demon setup. Choose an enemy row. Apply 2 Poison to each enemy in that row.

abilities.name: Demon Rupture
abilities.desc: Demon payoff. Remove all Poison and Bleed from one enemy. Deal removed counters x2 +3 damage, ignoring Armor.

name: Lady Eva
passive: Passive — Crimson Hunger: when Lady Eva hits a target that had Bleed before the hit, Lady Eva restores 1 HP.

abilities.name: Crimson Stab
abilities.desc: Melee precision attack. Deal 2 damage with Pierce 2. If the target had Bleed before the hit, Lady Eva restores 1 HP.

abilities.name: Mist Step
abilities.desc: Guard. Lady Eva gains Dodge. Dodge prevents the next attack targeting Lady Eva this round, then Dodge is removed.

abilities.name: Vampire Kiss
abilities.desc: Vampire setup. Deal 2 damage ignoring Armor, then apply 2 Bleed.

abilities.name: Final Bite
abilities.desc: Assassin/vampire payoff. Can target backline. Remove all Bleed. Deal Bleed x2 +1 damage. If any Bleed was removed, Lady Eva restores 2 HP.

name: Hyafrost
passive: Passive — Deep Winter: when Hyafrost applies Freeze to an enemy, Hyafrost gains +1 Armor until end of round. No Shield.

abilities.name: Frostbite
abilities.desc: Icecraft setup. Apply 2 Freeze. If the target already had Freeze before this ability, also deal 2 damage ignoring Armor.

abilities.name: Frost Armor
abilities.desc: Ally support. Choose an ally. That ally gains +3 Armor until end of round. Until end of round, enemies that hit that ally with melee gain 1 Freeze.

abilities.name: Frozen Field
abilities.desc: AoE icecraft control. Choose an enemy row. Apply 3 Freeze to each enemy in that row.

abilities.name: Absolute Zero
abilities.desc: AoE Freeze payoff. For each enemy with Freeze, remove all Freeze, deal removed Freeze x2 damage ignoring Armor, and apply Exhausted.

name: Bakub
passive: Passive — Nightmare Brew: Bakub's damaging abilities deal +2 damage to targets that currently have both Poison and Hypnosis.

abilities.name: Nightmare Vial
abilities.desc: Ranged setup. Apply 2 Poison and Hypnosis to one enemy. This sets up Poison and Hypnosis payoffs.

abilities.name: Mind Toxin
abilities.desc: Ranged hypnotic/witchcraft payoff. Deal 3 damage. If the target has Hypnosis, remove Hypnosis, deal 5 damage ignoring Armor instead, and apply 2 Poison.

abilities.name: Demon Fog
abilities.desc: AoE demon setup. Choose an enemy row. Apply 2 Poison and Hypnosis to each enemy in that row.

abilities.name: False Future
abilities.desc: Guard payoff. Choose an enemy with Hypnosis. Remove Hypnosis now. If that enemy uses a damage attack this round, cancel that action and apply 2 Poison. If it does not attack, nothing else happens.

name: Hope
passive: Passive - Rising Grace: Hope gets +1 damage until end of round for each unique ally that gained life this round.

abilities.name: Mend Wounds
abilities.desc: Divinity support. Restore 5 HP to one ally.

abilities.name: Hopeful Strike
abilities.desc: Low damage melee attack. Deal 2 damage to one enemy in the front row.

abilities.name: Blessing Shield
abilities.desc: Guard. Choose one ally. That ally gains 4 Shield before attacks resolve.

abilities.name: Delayed Judgement
abilities.desc: Delayed ranged attack. Choose one enemy. At the start of next round, deal 6 damage.

name: Zahria
passive: Passive - Sanguine Aegis: Zahria gains +1 Armor until end of round for each unique enemy that lost life from Bleed this round.

abilities.name: Blood Mist
abilities.desc: Bloodcraft row setup. Choose an enemy row. Each enemy in that row with Bleed gains 2 more Bleed.

abilities.name: Red Rain
abilities.desc: Bloodcraft area setup. Apply 1 Bleed to every enemy.

abilities.name: Mass Drain
abilities.desc: Bloodcraft payoff. Each enemy with Bleed loses HP equal to its Bleed, then removes that Bleed. Zahria heals for the total HP lost this way.

abilities.name: Blood Blade
abilities.desc: Ranged attack. Deal 6 damage to one enemy.
